name: PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk
summary: PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes ceramic tiles in Indonesia. The company primarily offers wall tiles. It sells its products under the Arwana and UNO brands through sub-distributors and retail outlets. The company was formerly known as PT Arwana Citra Mulia and changed its name to PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk in November 1993. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
